gauge.name: Chambers Creek near Rice

impacts.statement: Flood waters will top the left bank levee. Major flooding will occur along the creek to the farm and ranch industries. Flood waters will top the left bank levee, and flooding will begin outside the levees. Danger also exists for the levees to fail along the left bank.
Major out of bank flooding is expected. Ranch and farm industries will be flooded. Rural roads will be underwater.
Major out of bank flooding along the creek is expected. Farm and ranch industries will be flooded. Several rural roads along the river will be flooded.
Moderate out of bank flooding will occur along the creek. A few rural roads will be flooded. Minor lowland flooding is expected for farms and ranches downstream.
Minor out of bank flooding will occur along the creek. This will be a problem for some cattle and farm industries.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States

Observations courtesy of U.S. Army Corps of Engineers

hydronotes.statement: River forecasts for this location take into account past precipitation and the precipitation amounts expected approximately 24 hours into the future from the forecast issuance time.

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are issued as needed during times of high water, but are not routinely available.
